reviews.comment:
Excelente espacio de encuentro, para tomar café y como siempre los mejores combustibles. Tienen todos los servicios, y hasta un servicio de lubricentro. La atención de personal del ACA es de lo mejor, te vas con soluciones. El shop súper completo, y acepta todos los medios de pago. El wifi funciona excelente, lo uso como oficina y nunca un drama.  Los baños siempre limpios.  Soy de visitar un parque que tiene detrás de la estación está hermoso y re seguro

(Translated by Google)
Excellent meeting place, great for coffee, and as always, the best fuels. They have all the services, including a lube center. The ACA staff are top-notch; you'll leave with solutions. The shop is very well-stocked and accepts all forms of payment. The Wi-Fi works perfectly; I use it as an office and have never had a problem. The restrooms are always clean. I like to visit the park behind the station; it's beautiful and very safe.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaOWF2TDVBRRAB
